title: BEM-849 protocol v1
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:41 (UTC+3)'
source=Path('governance/protocols/BEM846_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md')
text=source.read_text(errors='ignore') if source.exists() else '# Missing BEM846 source\n'
v1=Path('governance/protocols/BEM849_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL_V1.md')
v1.write_text(text.replace('Версия: v0.1','Версия: v1.0').replace('Статус: draft_for_operator_review','Статус: promoted_after_evidence_marker')+sep+'## Promotion evidence'+sep+sep+'- BEM-848 marker: `governance/state/bem848_PROTOCOL_CAN_ADVANCE.marker`'+sep+'- Promoted at: '+created+sep+'- Rule: reports do not stop development; next active regression gate is required.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':'protocol_promoted_to_v1','protocol':str(v1),'evidence_marker':'governance/state/bem848_PROTOCOL_CAN_ADVANCE.marker','next_action':'install regression gate so dispatch/runtime/response triad remains enforced','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_promote_protocol_v1.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_promote_protocol_v1.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Promote Protocol V1 | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: install regression gate for dispatch/runtime/response triad. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: protocol_promoted_to_v1'+sep+'Next: install regression gate for triad proof.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(v1),'governance/state/bem849_promote_protocol_v1.json','governance/reports/bem849_promote_protocol_v1.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Promoted the human-readable multi-agent development protocol to v1.0 after BEM-848 evidence marker allowed advancement')
"""
